summary.en: Saint Vincent and the Grenadines electricity supply is operated by St Vincent Electricity Services Ltd (VINLEC) under the regulatory oversight of the the energy-portfolio ministry. The island follows a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz utility system. Any grid-connected EV charger should be reviewed with VINLEC for service capacity, metering, load management, protection coordination, earthing, commissioning, and tariff or interconnection treatment, especially for hotel, fleet, airport, port, or public-site installations. Renewable-energy policy interest in geothermal and solar generation may support pilot charging projects, but it does not remove utility approval obligations.
summary.zh: 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯电力供应由圣文森特和格林纳丁斯电力服务有限公司（VINLEC）运营，并受国家公用事业监管委员会（能源主管部委）监管。该岛国采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz公用电力系统。任何并网电动汽车充电桩都应与VINLEC确认供电容量、计量、负载管理、保护配合、接地、调试以及电价或互联处理，尤其是酒店、车队、机场、港口或公共场所安装。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯对地热和太阳能等可再生能源有政策推动，可能支持充电桩试点项目，但不会免除公用事业审批义务。
summary.zht: 聖文森特和格林納丁斯電力供應由聖文森特和格林納丁斯電力服務有限公司（VINLEC）運營，並受國家公用事業監管委員會（能源主管部委）監管。該島國採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz公用電力系統。任何併網電動汽車充電樁都應與VINLEC確認供電容量、計量、負載管理、保護配合、接地、調試以及電價或互聯處理，尤其是酒店、車隊、機場、港口或公共場所安裝。聖文森特和格林納丁斯對地熱和太陽能等可再生能源有政策推動，可能支持充電樁試點項目，但不會免除公用事業審批義務。

standards_or_laws: VINLEC utility connection and electrical service requirements
IEC 60038 — standard voltages, 230 / 400 V at 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic EV charger installations are designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 charging-system requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930 DC communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. Saint Vincent and the Grenadines has the same frequency but a different nominal voltage at 230 / 400 V, so input voltage range, protective-device ratings, metering, thermal design, and power-quality behavior must be confirmed for VINLEC service conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩安装通常基于220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023充电系统要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通信以及当地电网运营商项目验收。圣文森特和格林纳丁斯频率相同但标称电压不同，为230 / 400 V，因此须针对VINLEC供电条件确认输入电压范围、保护器件额定值、计量、热设计和电能质量表现。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁安裝通常基於220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023充電系統要求、GB/T 20234接口、GB/T 27930直流通訊以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。聖文森特和格林納丁斯頻率相同但標稱電壓不同，為230 / 400 V，因此須針對VINLEC供電條件確認輸入電壓範圍、保護器件額定值、計量、熱設計和電能質量表現。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must not treat 220 / 380 V China grid evidence as automatically Saint Vincent and the Grenadines-ready. Confirm 230 / 400 V input tolerance at 50 Hz, harmonic emissions, residual-current and overcurrent protection, metering, earthing, site load calculations, and VINLEC connection documentation. For tourism sites and renewable-energy pilots, confirm whether solar, storage, or load-management controls are needed to avoid local feeder constraints.
gap.zh: 出口商不应将中国220 / 380 V电网证据视为自动适用于圣文森特和格林纳丁斯。须确认50 Hz下230 / 400 V输入容差、谐波发射、剩余电流和过流保护、计量、接地、现场负荷计算以及VINLEC接入文件。对于旅游场所和可再生能源试点，还应确认是否需要太阳能、储能或负载管理控制，以避免当地馈线容量限制。
gap.zht: 出口商不應將中國220 / 380 V電網證據視為自動適用於聖文森特和格林納丁斯。須確認50 Hz下230 / 400 V輸入容差、諧波發射、剩餘電流和過流保護、計量、接地、現場負荷計算以及VINLEC接入文件。對於旅遊場所和可再生能源試點，還應確認是否需要太陽能、儲能或負載管理控制，以避免當地饋線容量限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — VINLEC service approval and Ministry-overseen electricity requirements must be confirmed for the specific site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a VINLEC or the energy-portfolio ministry approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Saint Vincent and the Grenadines uses 230 / 400 V at 50 Hz, not China's 220 / 380 V baseline. A charger package needs VINLEC site review, 230 / 400 V input confirmation, IEC 61000 power-quality evidence, and load-management planning where feeder capacity is limited.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 圣文森特和格林纳丁斯采用230 / 400 V、50 Hz，而非中国220 / 380 V基线。充电桩资料包须包括VINLEC现场审查、230 / 400 V输入确认、IEC 61000电能质量证据，以及在馈线容量受限时的负载管理规划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 聖文森特和格林納丁斯採用230 / 400 V、50 Hz，而非中國220 / 380 V基線。充電樁資料包須包括VINLEC現場審查、230 / 400 V輸入確認、IEC 61000電能質量證據，以及在饋線容量受限時的負載管理規劃。
